'''鈭歯g-n-m''' ('''nganama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knead|knead]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knead|knead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-n-m
|-
! Lemma
| nganama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nganamithi|nganamithi]] || [[word:nganamiji|nganamiji]] || [[word:nganamishi|nganamishi]] || [[word:nganami|nganami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganamuthuth|nganamuthuth]] || [[word:nganamujuj|nganamujuj]] || [[word:nganamushush|nganamushush]] || [[word:nganam|nganam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganamuthu|nganamuthu]] || [[word:nganamuju|nganamuju]] || [[word:nganamushu|nganamushu]] || [[word:nganamu|nganamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganamufuth|nganamufuth]] || [[word:nganamufuj|nganamufuj]] || [[word:nganamufush|nganamufush]] || [[word:nganamuf|nganamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nganamethe|nganamethe]] || [[word:nganameje|nganameje]] || [[word:nganameshe|nganameshe]] || [[word:nganame|nganame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganamothoth|nganamothoth]] || [[word:nganamojoj|nganamojoj]] || [[word:nganamoshosh|nganamoshosh]] || [[word:nganam|nganam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganamotho|nganamotho]] || [[word:nganamojo|nganamojo]] || [[word:nganamosho|nganamosho]] || [[word:nganamo|nganamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganamofoth|nganamofoth]] || [[word:nganamofoj|nganamofoj]] || [[word:nganamofosh|nganamofosh]] || [[word:nganamof|nganamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nganam忙th忙|nganam忙th忙]] || [[word:nganam忙j忙|nganam忙j忙]] || [[word:nganam忙sh忙|nganam忙sh忙]] || [[word:nganam忙|nganam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nganamathath|nganamathath]] || [[word:nganamajaj|nganamajaj]] || [[word:nganamashash|nganamashash]] || [[word:nganam|nganam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganamatha|nganamatha]] || [[word:nganamaja|nganamaja]] || [[word:nganamasha|nganamasha]] || [[word:nganama|nganama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganamafath|nganamafath]] || [[word:nganamafaj|nganamafaj]] || [[word:nganamafash|nganamafash]] || [[word:nganamaf|nganamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nganamasha|nganamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonganamasha|gonganamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinganamasha|gokinganamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nganamn眉sha|nganamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonganamnkn眉sha|gonganamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinganamn眉sha|gokinganamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nganamsh毛sha|nganamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonganamnksh毛sha|gonganamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinganamsh毛sha|gokinganamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganamrosha|nganamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganamnkrosha|gonganamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganamrosha|gokinganamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nganammusha|nganammusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganamnkmusha|gonganamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganammusha|gokinganammusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nganamsherasha|nganamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonganamnksherasha|gonganamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinganamsherasha|gokinganamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nganamngasha|nganamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonganamnkngasha|gonganamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinganamngasha|gokinganamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nganamyasha|nganamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonganamnkyasha|gonganamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinganamyasha|gokinganamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nganamyamasha|nganamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonganamnkyamasha|gonganamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinganamyamasha|gokinganamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nganamn眉sh毛sha|nganamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonganamnkn眉sh毛sha|gonganamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinganamn眉sh毛sha|gokinganamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganamn眉rosha|nganamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganamnkn眉rosha|gonganamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganamn眉rosha|gokinganamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nganamn眉musha|nganamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganamnkn眉musha|gonganamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganamn眉musha|gokinganamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nganamsh毛n眉sha|nganamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonganamnksh毛n眉sha|gonganamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinganamsh毛n眉sha|gokinganamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganamsh毛rosha|nganamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganamnksh毛rosha|gonganamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganamsh毛rosha|gokinganamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nganamsh毛musha|nganamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganamnksh毛musha|gonganamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganamsh毛musha|gokinganamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nganamron眉sha|nganamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonganamnkron眉sha|gonganamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinganamron眉sha|gokinganamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nganamrosh毛sha|nganamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonganamnkrosh毛sha|gonganamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinganamrosh毛sha|gokinganamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nganamromusha|nganamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonganamnkromusha|gonganamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinganamromusha|gokinganamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nganammun眉sha|nganammun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonganamnkmun眉sha|gonganamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinganammun眉sha|gokinganammun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nganammush毛sha|nganammush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonganamnkmush毛sha|gonganamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinganammush毛sha|gokinganammush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nganammurosha|nganammurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonganamnkmurosha|gonganamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinganammurosha|gokinganammurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nganam|nganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙n忙m|ng忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honganam|honganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙n忙m|hong忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonganam|hohonganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙n忙m|hohong忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nganam|n眉nganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙n忙m|n眉ng忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nganam|n眉n眉nganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙n忙m|n眉n眉ng忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nganam|n茂nganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙n忙m|n茂ng忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nganam|n茂n茂nganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙n忙m|n茂n茂ng忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunganam|lunganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙n忙m|lung忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunganam|lulunganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙n忙m|lulung忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linganam|linganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙n忙m|ling忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinganam|lilinganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙n忙m|liling忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konganam|konganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙n忙m|kong忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonganam|kokonganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙n忙m|kokong忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenganam|kenganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙n忙m|keng忙n忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenganam|kekenganam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙n忙m|kekeng忙n忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
